mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, SORT_ORDER, LEVEL_NO FROM DEPT WHERE ENABLED = TRUE ORDER BY LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER

WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_TREE (DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER, DEPTH, PATH) AS ( SELECT DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER, 0 AS DEPTH, CAST(DEPT_ID AS VARCHAR(500)) AS PATH FROM DEPT WHERE PARENT_ID IS NULL AND ENABLED = TRUE UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPT_ID, d.DEPT_NAME, d.PARENT_ID, d.LEVEL_NO, d.SORT_ORDER, t.DEPTH + 1, t.PATH || '/' || d.DEPT_ID FROM DEPT d JOIN DEPT_TREE t ON d.PARENT_ID = t.DEPT_ID WHERE d.ENABLED = TRUE ) SELECT DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PARENT_ID, LEVEL_NO, SORT_ORDER, DEPTH, PATH FROM DEPT_TREE ORDER BY PATH
